metadata.note: Species reservation and status ledger. Includes cumulative image batches through the remaining-coverage pass, which finished the last 14 uncovered plant-record slugs and upgraded 7 thinner existing image sets.
metadata.parallel_work_model: foreman-worker; worker chats research claimed species, integration chat applies canonical JSON edits and package/version changes
metadata.coordination_rule: Claim species before editing; avoid editing slugs already marked in_use unless explicitly reassigned or stale; do not create deployable sidecar species files.
metadata.last_parallel_integration_note: Integrated top danger-entry handoff and food/forage display normalization; Worker 4 high-value edible cleanup queued for next species-content pass.
